scripts.build:packages: npm run build -w @sms/common && npm run build -w @sms/shared && npm run build -w @sms/core && npm run build -w @sms/infrastructure
scripts.build:libs: npm run build -w @sms/contracts && npm run build -w @sms/domain && npm run build -w @sms/application && npm run build -w @sms/infrastructure
scripts.build:libs-for-web: npm run build -w @sms/contracts && npm run build -w @sms/domain
